stories.summary: We break down the early numbers on baseball's challenge system.

stories.title: Real or not? An early verdict on MLB's most surpri...
stories.summary: We offer an early postseason verdict on MLB's most surprising teams almost two months into the 2026 season.

stories.title: Chiefs' Rice violates probation, ordered to jail
stories.summary: Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice has been sentenced to immediately serve 30 days in jail after testing positive for marijuana in violation of the terms of his probation.

stories.title: JSN posts video over 'disrespectful' trophy gaffe
stories.summary: Jaxon Smith-Njigba, the NFL's reigning AP Offensive Player of the Year, posted a video to his Instagram account that showed how his trophy was mislabeled.

stories.title: NAACP calls for boycott of some college programs
stories.summary: The NAACP on Tuesday launched the "Out of Bounds" campaign to urge Black athletes and fans to boycott some public universities over voting restrictions.
